metadata.description: Opaque caller metadata. Copied to result but not interpreted by gpu-qual.

request_id.description: Caller-supplied lease, job, or request identifier

expected.description: The expected contract. All fields are optional. Missing fields mean do not check.

allowed_names.description: Allowed NVML GPU product names. Empty or absent means do not check.

min_memory_mib.description: Minimum memory per physical GPU in mebibytes (1 MiB = 1024^2 bytes)

mig_mode.description: Expected MIG mode. 'any' means do not check.

min_cuda_visible_devices.description: Minimum number of CUDA-visible devices. Only meaningful when cuda_smoke is enabled.

min_driver_version.description: Minimum acceptable NVIDIA driver version string (e.g. '550.90.07')

health.description: Expected GPU health state. All fields are optional. Missing fields mean do not check.

ecc_mode_enabled.description: Whether ECC memory protection is expected to be enabled

max_volatile_uncorrectable_ecc.description: Maximum allowed uncorrectable ECC errors since last driver reload or GPU reset. 0 means reject any GPU with a current-session error.

max_aggregate_uncorrectable_ecc.description: Maximum allowed lifetime uncorrectable ECC errors persisted in InfoROM. Null or absent means do not check.

allow_row_remap_pending.description: Whether to accept GPUs with a row remapping pending (requires GPU reset to apply). False means reject nodes needing a reset.

allow_row_remap_failure.description: Whether to accept GPUs with a row remapping failure (spare rows exhausted, RMA candidate). Should almost always be false.

allow_pending_retired_pages.description: Whether to accept GPUs with pending page retirements (pre-Ampere equivalent of row_remap_pending). False means reject nodes needing a reset.

disallowed_recovery_actions.description: Recovery actions that must not be present on any GPU. Empty or absent means do not check. Typically set to all non-none values for a clean handoff.

fabric.description: NVSwitch fabric requirements. Auto-skipped on non-NVSwitch hardware.

require_fabric_ready.description: Whether the NVLink fabric must be fully initialized. Applies to NVSwitch nodes (DGX/HGX A100/H100, GB200). If fabric is not ready, CUDA multi-GPU workloads will fail with error 802.

policy.description: Severity for each check. Missing fields fall back to defaults. hard=reject node, warn=pass with warning, report=pass silently with reason recorded.

options.description: Runtime options for this probe invocation.

cuda_smoke.description: Whether to run the optional CUDA Driver API smoke test. Default false.

include_health.description: Whether to collect and report GPU health signals (ECC, row remap, recovery action). Default true.

timeout_ms.description: Total probe timeout in milliseconds. Default 10000.

cuda_smoke_timeout_ms.description: Timeout for the CUDA smoke test in milliseconds. Only read when cuda_smoke is true. Default 5000.
